title: Generic Configuration
description: Configuration for cryptographic operations, artifact discovery, SBOM retention, and cloud passport decryption

crypt.title: Enable Cryptographic Operations
crypt.description: Specifies whether cryptographic operations should be enabled

crypt_backend.title: Cryptographic Backend
crypt_backend.description: The backend system used for cryptographic operations

artifact_definitions_discovery_mode.title: Artifact Definitions Discovery Mode
artifact_definitions_discovery_mode.description: Configures the mode of discovering Artifact Definitions

app_reg_def_mode.title: Application and Registry Definitions Discovery Mode
app_reg_def_mode.description: Configures the mode of discovering Application and Registry Definitions

sbom_retention.title: SBOM Retention Configuration
sbom_retention.description: Configuration for automatic SBOM file cleanup to manage repository size. Triggers only when repository reaches 1200 GB threshold.

enabled.title: Enable SBOM Retention
enabled.description: Enable or disable SBOM retention cleanup

keep_versions_per_app.title: Versions to Keep
keep_versions_per_app.description: Number of latest versions to keep per application. Used only when enabled is true.
